caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a dark necklace and a small lapel microphone clipped to her neckline. Across the frames, she is seen talking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points; her hands move from her sides toward the center and outward. In the lower-left corner of each frame, a small gold and red logo is visible, accompanied by the text "NPTEL". The setting remains static throughout the sequence, with the woman centered in the shot as she delivers her presentation. There are no other people or objects visible in the scene.
